SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.ds

Interface PoolDataSource

public interface PoolDataSource
Interface to represent a datasource object.

JPA-LiTE offers sourcing connection from a local data source even if the transaction type is specified as RESOURCE_LOCAL. Typically if the transaction type of the persistence unit is JTA, the jta-datasource element is used to declare the JNDI name of the JTA data source that will be used to obtain connections. This is the common case.

It is possible for some application to set RESOURCE_LOCAL as transaction type, yet use a datasource for connection pooling. If the datasource option is enabled, via jpa-lite.data.source, then the custom datasource will be initialized and framework will start connection pooling. However, to use this option, application has to implement the PoolDataSource class and override the methods defined. If no custom data source is provided, then the platform BasicDataSource will be used. This datasource does not offer connection pooling.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    closeCachedConnection(Connection connection)
    Close and return the connection to the underlying pool.
